rationale: Refactored resolver child request construction to consume a single canonical resolverTemplate.executionProfileRef key and write only task.runtime.executionProfileRef for the child run.
Refactored merge automation resolver template construction to read the parent profile from the existing parameters.profileId source and emit only resolverTemplate.executionProfileRef.
Removed redundant profile/model/effort alias propagation from the merge automation resolver template and child runtime payload.
Removed the multiple-profile-field selection path so conflicting resolverTemplate aliases are no longer accepted or silently prioritized.
Informational Codex review wrapper with no actionable code feedback.
